  • Uses of AlliancePlugin in net.joseplay.allianceutils.api.extensions

    Fields in net.joseplay.allianceutils.api.extensions with type parameters of type AlliancePlugin
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    Map<AlliancePlugin,List<AllianceCommandExecutor>>
    AllianceCommandManager.commands
    Stores commands grouped by their owning plugin.
    Map<AlliancePlugin,List<org.bukkit.event.Listener>>
    AllianceListenerManager.listeners
    Stores listeners grouped by their owning extension.
    Methods in net.joseplay.allianceutils.api.extensions with parameters of type AlliancePlugin
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<String>
    AllianceCommandManager.getAllCommandNames(AlliancePlugin plugin)
    Retrieves all command names (including aliases) for a specific plugin.
    List<org.bukkit.event.Listener>
    AllianceListenerManager.getListeners(AlliancePlugin extension)
    Retrieves all listeners registered for a specific extension.
    void
    AllianceCommandManager.registerCommand(AlliancePlugin plugin, AllianceCommandExecutor command)
    Registers a command under a specific plugin.
    void
    FakeCommandRegister.registerFakeCommand(AllianceCommandExecutor executor, AlliancePlugin extension)
    Registers a dynamic command and binds it to an AllianceCommandExecutor.
    void
    AllianceListenerManager.registerListener(AlliancePlugin extension, org.bukkit.event.Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for a given extension.
    void
    AllianceCommandManager.unregisterCommands(AlliancePlugin extension)
    Unregisters all commands associated with a specific plugin.
    void
    FakeCommandRegister.unregisterFakeCommand(AllianceCommandExecutor executor, AlliancePlugin extension)
    Unregisters a command and all its aliases from Bukkit.
    void
    AllianceListenerManager.unregisterListener(AlliancePlugin extension, org.bukkit.event.Listener listener)
    Unregisters a specific listener from an extension.
    void
    AllianceListenerManager.unregisterListeners(AlliancePlugin extension)
    Unregisters all listeners associated with a given extension.
